name: kade-walks-toward
prompt: Two-shot. Dark-haired young man walking toward door, toward red-haired woman in his path. Powers clashing as he approaches — heat meeting heat, sparks visible. She won't step aside. He won't stop. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

name: kade-close-senna
prompt: Close-up. Dark-haired young man, close enough to red-haired woman that their powers spark. Amber eyes steady, delivering truth. No anger — worse, pity. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

dialogue.speaker: Kade
dialogue.text: But if she was going to be someone's? She wouldn't choose the girl who makes her feel like a trophy.

name: kade-brushes-past
prompt: Medium shot from behind. Dark-haired young man walking away through storage room doorway alone, back to camera, heat trailing from him. Red-haired woman visible in foreground, frozen in place, stunned. He's leaving. She can't move. Dismissal. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style
